entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A widely cultivated legume that fixes atmospheric nitrogen through symbiosis with rhizobia.

entities.name: RHIZOBIA BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that form a symbiotic relationship with chickpea to facilitate nitrogen fixation in root nodules.

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: A protocol used to accelerate the development of recombinant inbred line populations.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A population of lines developed through repeated selfing to achieve homozygosity.

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The formation of root nodules by rhizobia, critical for nitrogen fixation and crop yield.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of seeds produced per plant or area, used as a primary measure of productivity.

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, an indicator of seed size and quality.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass produced by the plant.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total count of pods produced by a single plant.

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEEDS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total count of seeds produced by a single plant.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of main branches originating from the primary stem.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant from the ground to the highest point.

entities.name: DAYS TO FIRST FLOWERING
entities.description: The time interval from sowing to the appearance of the first flower.

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The stage at which the crop has reached full physiological development.

entities.name: GENOTYPE-TRAIT BI-PLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify the adaptability of genotypes across different traits and environments.

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The typical environmental settings where the crop is grown for evaluation.

entities.name: ATMOSPHERIC NITROGEN
entities.description: Nitrogen gas from the air that is converted into usable forms by symbiotic bacteria.
